creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Well you should, as these are obviously kde@ territory, so before investing time mailing kde@/lookgin in our repo could save you some time :)

I won't include the word -style as the package is called "oxygen" upstream. With the prefix for the distribution "plasma5" it is part of, this gives us "plasma5-oxygen" which is carried through all the plasma5 ports -- also it would break the DISTFILES magic :)


mfg Tobias
